underlying_goal: Implement the full conversational search feature for a recommendations service based on an existing implementation plan, including OpenSearch integration, DTOs, REST endpoints, and a debug UI
friction_detail: The generated HTML/JS template literal had incorrect quote escaping causing a SyntaxError in the browser debug UI.
brief_summary: User asked Claude to implement a full conversational search feature from a plan; Claude completed it across multiple files but initially only did the infrastructure layer and also shipped a JS escaping bug in the debug UI, both of which the user had to flag.
